news.title: Clinical trial flaws ‘being scaled, not solved’ by AI: report

news.title: Incyte inks deal with Edison Scientific to train AI through drug discovery
news.snippet: Incyte and Edison Scientific have signed a collaboration to employ Edison’s AI scientist, Kosmos, in Incyte’s drug discovery and development work.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Accro accrues $50M series C; Create corrals $122M
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Merck inks Keytruda supply pact to support Exelixis’ colorectal cancer trial
news.snippet: Exelixis has secured supplies of subcutaneous Keytruda from Merck & Co. for a planned phase 3 study, completing the trio of contributors needed to run the colorectal cancer trial.

news.title: Facing mounting China licensing costs, biopharma buyers turn to AI and local know-how to keep up
news.snippet: Chinese companies now represent 50% of global out-licensing deals, with U.S. companies dropping to about 28%, according to SynBioBeta data.

news.title: Lauxera Capital Partners raises a hefty €520M for health, medtech companies
news.snippet: Lauxera Capital Partners has nearly doubled the size of its first funding drive with a €520 million ($605 million) raise for health and medical technology companies.

news.title: Herantis taps Indivi for digital biomarker tech in Parkinson’s disease trial
news.snippet: Finnish biotech Herantis Pharma is teaming up with Swiss medtech Indivi to help seek early detection of Parkinson’s disease in a new proof-of-concept clinical trial.

news.title: Relay ‘full steam ahead’ on PI3K inhibitor fueled by first phase 2 data in blood vessel disorder
news.snippet: Relay Therapeutics’ R&D chief remains convinced the biotech’s PI3Kα inhibitor will carve out its own niche after reporting a slice of phase 2 data in patients with a type of blood vessel disorder.

news.title: Sanofi and Wave post AATD updates in race to end genetic disease’s 40-year new treatment drought

news.title: BioMarin’s $270M Inozyme bet looks in trouble after rare disease drug misses key ph. 3 goal

news.title: After rare disease flop, cash-strapped Quince finds salvation in reverse merger

news.title: Nominations now open for Fierce Biotech's 2026 Fierce 15
news.snippet: It's time to kick off our annual hunt for the latest crop of trailblazing biotechs that we sense are going to shape the industry of the future.

news.title: Vincentage sees 12.4% weight loss for oral GLP-1, will chase Lilly to Chinese regulators
news.snippet: Vincentage Pharma’s oral GLP-1 agonist has been tied to a mean weight loss of 12.4% over a year, setting up the biotech to pursue Eli Lilly’s orforglipron to Chinese regulators.

news.title: Regeneron pens $2.3B pact with Parabilis to develop new type of ADC-like therapy

news.title: Boston Scientific funnels $1.5B into MiRus, with option to buy TAVR system

news.title: UCB digs deeper into Bimzelx’s psoriatic arthritis win over Skyrizi

news.title: Roche signs generic Xofluza licensing deal with Medicines Patent Pool for 129 countries
news.snippet: Roche has signed a voluntary license agreement providing its popular influenza antiviral drug Xofluza for generic drugmakers to copy in 129 developing countries.

news.title: White House adds 600 generic meds to TrumpRx purchasing portal

news.title: Takeda slapped with $885M verdict in pay-for-delay antitrust case

news.title: Novartis terminates plant contract with Chinese CDMO Porton, threatens $64M in legal claims

news.title: Merck, Kelun score with sac-TMT in endometrial cancer trial

news.title: Bristol Myers looks at Houston for potential $1B manufacturing plant
news.snippet: As Bristol Myers looks for suitable sites for a large U.S. manufacturing plant, Houston has emerged as one contender.

news.title: Daiichi, AstraZeneca’s Enhertu breaks into early breast cancer with dual FDA approvals

news.title: Eli Lilly teams up with Caitlin Clark to bounce sports courts into Indianapolis neighborhoods
news.snippet: Eli Lilly has partnered with basketball star Caitlin Clark’s foundation to open three multisport community courts across Indianapolis.

news.title: STAT+: Virginia governor vetoes legislation to create an advisory panel to lower the cost of prescription drugs
news.snippet: Virginia's governor vetoed a closely watched effort to create an advisory panel to lower prescription drug costs.

news.title: STAT+: At a time of tumult at FDA, a former commissioner is hopeful it’s on a better path
news.snippet: With the FDA facing upheaval and personnel exits, former commissioner David Kessler sees an opportunity whereby the agency can make a turn for the better.

news.snippet: “On paper, I have insurance coverage. In real life, I don’t have access. That’s what I call ‘ghost approval,’” writes patient advocate Payton Herres.

news.title: MPs call for sunbed advertising ban to help prevent skin cancer
